about.heading: Same crew shows up every time
about.body: We're the Macon lawn team that actually keeps their word. When we say we'll be there, we show up.

reviews.name: Charlotte L.
reviews.text: Been through so many lawn services before finding Mr. Reese and his crew. They're trustworthy, consistent, and reliable — exactly what I needed for my elderly Mom.

reviews.name: Alysha R.
reviews.text: After two surgeries, my grass was sky-high. These guys cleaned everything up perfectly — mowed, trimmed bushes, pulled weeds, the whole job.

reviews.name: Amanda R.
reviews.text: Best lawn service I've had since moving here. My yard was terrible and no one else would follow through. They kept their word and were incredibly helpful.

cta.heading: Ready for a yard that actually gets maintained?
cta.body: Free quotes, honest pricing, and the same reliable crew every time. Call today and see why Macon keeps choosing J&J.
